---
title: "Taxila"
description: "Taxila widget test page"
---

A test page for Taxila widgets.

## Events table with sidebar
<!--
```{=html}
<link rel="stylesheet" property="stylesheet" href="https://elixirtess.github.io/TeSS_widgets/css/tess-widget.css"/>
<div id="tess-widget-events-table" class="tess-widget tess-widget-faceted-table"></div>
<script>
function initTeSSWidgets() {
    TessWidget.Events(document.getElementById('tess-widget-events-table'),
        'FacetedTable',
        {
            opts: {
                columns: [{name: 'Date', field: 'start'},
                    {name: 'Name', field: 'title'},
                    {name: 'Provider', field: 'organizer'},
                    {name: 'Location', field: 'location'}],
                allowedFacets: ['scientific-topics', 'city', 'language', 'keyword'],
                //facetOptionLimit: 5
            },
            params: {
                //targetAudience: 'data steward', //filter not yet possible due to uncontrolled field OR just show events in the RDNL collection:
                collections: ['Research Data Netherlands (RDNL)'],
                //q: 'RDNL OR eScience OR DCC-PO OR LCRDM',
                pageSize: 5,
                includeExpired: true
            },
            baseUrl:'https://taxila.nl',
            instanceName: 'Taxila',
            emptyText: 'No trainings found'
        });
}

</script>
<script async="" defer="" src="https://elixirtess.github.io/TeSS_widgets/js/tess-widget-standalone.js" onload="initTeSSWidgets()"></script>

```
-->

## Events table with dropdowns

```{=html}
<link rel="stylesheet" property="stylesheet" href="https://elixirtess.github.io/TeSS_widgets/css/tess-widget.css"/>
<div id="tess-widget-dropdown-table" class="tess-widget tess-widget-dropdown-table"></div>
<script>
function initTeSSWidgets() {
    TessWidget.Events(document.getElementById('tess-widget-dropdown-table'),
        'DropdownTable',
        {
            opts: {
                columns: [{name: 'Date', field: 'start'},
                    {name: 'Name', field: 'title'},
                    {name: 'Provider', field: 'organizer'},
                    {name: 'Location', field: 'location'}],
                dropdowns: [{name: 'Type', field: 'event-types'},
                    {name: 'City', field: 'city'},
                    {name: 'Language', field: 'language'},
                    {name: 'Topic', field: 'scientific-topics'}]
            },
            params: {
                //targetAudience: 'data steward', //filter not yet possible due to uncontrolled field OR just show events in the RDNL collection:
                collections: ['Research Data Netherlands (RDNL)'],
                //q: 'RDNL OR eScience OR DCC-PO OR LCRDM',
                pageSize: 5,
                includeExpired: true
            },
            baseUrl:'https://taxila.nl',
            instanceName: 'Taxila',
            emptyText: 'No trainings found'
        });
}
</script>
<script async="" defer="" src="https://elixirtess.github.io/TeSS_widgets/js/tess-widget-standalone.js" onload="initTeSSWidgets()"></script>

```
